title: Ewok Handler

'''Ewok Handlers''' were [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] used by the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]]. They were armed with [[Gaderffii/Legends|Gaffi Sticks]] and used [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] as [[Bomb/Legends|bombs]].

Prior to battle, the handlers captured many Ewoks and strap vests with explosives such as [[Thermal detonator/Legends|Thermal detonators]] on them. When enemy infantry got near to [[Tyber Zann]]'s forces, the handlers unleashed their confused captives, who then ran towards the enemies in hopes of salvation, only to blow up in a devastating explosion that [[Death/Legends|engulfed]] both the Ewoks and the targets.

==Behind the scenes==
Ewok handlers look similar to the the [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] handler [[Malakili/Legends|Malakili]] from [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']]. It is unknown if this is meant to imply a connection to the [[Circus Horrificus/Legends|Circus Horrificus]], the organization to which Malakili once belonged.

In Galactic Conquest mode in ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption|Forces of Corruption]]'', Ewok Handlers can only be recruited if [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] has been corrupted with [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]]. Unlike other slave units, they can only be recruited on planets that have [[Consortium palace]]s.
